headline: Influencer's 'Sad' Post Used The Same Crying Photo From 3 Different Breakups
summary: The tear tracks are identical. Fans have created a bingo card.
fullBody: Brittany Recycle has posted the same crying selfie for 3 different breakups with 3 different captions: 'heartbroken,' 'betrayed,' and 'manifesting better.' The photo features the same tear track, the same lighting, and the same 'sad girl' angle. 'It's a versatile photo,' Brittany explained. Her fans have started a bingo card titled 'which breakup caption will she use next?' Brittany's next post: 'healing era' — same photo, new filter.
